auth.err_champs: ❌ A ka kan ka fara kɔnɔkow hakɛ la.
auth.err_champs_vides: Kɔnɔkow bɛɛ ka kan ka kɛ.
auth.err_password_court: Sɛgɛsɛgɛli kuma ka kan ka kɛ ɲɔgɔndan 4 kɔnɔ.
auth.message_bienvenue_doctrinal:
🌟 Assalamu Alaykum!

I ka ɲinɛni siraba ɲinɛn, i ka fiqh hakɛ ni nisab hakɛ sɛbɛn 'Labɛn' ɲinɛ kɔnɔ.

🛡️ SEKU: Hayaati app bɛ Sunni Dɛmɛbagaw ni Dar es Salaam Cinkassé (Togo) Islam Sugu bɛ sekyɛ ye. I ka ɲɛnaminɛnan bɛ ɲɛnaminɛ.

onboarding.prieres_manquees:
⚠️ SALLU LADILANNAN: Waati bɔra i sallu wulilan: {}.
👉 I ka ɲinɛni ɲinɛ sira ɲinɛnin sanninka kɔrɔ.
onboarding.prieres_ok: ✨ A ka di: I sallu bɛɛ ɲinɛnin bɛ ɲɛnabɔ waati la.
onboarding.joumouah: 🌟 JUMA: Al-Kahf Surat karamɔ, ni Ala ka ɲɔgɔn sira ɲinɛ (ﷺ).
onboarding.jours_blancs: ⚪ KALAN BANGEN: An bɛ Waati Npɛn (13, 14, 15 Hijria kalo) la.
onboarding.nawafil_ok: • ✅ Sallu wulilannan (Nawafil) ɲɛnabɔ. Ala k'i ɲɛnaminɛ.
onboarding.nawafil_ko:
• 🔴 NAWAFIL ƝƐNAMINƐNAN: I tɛ sallu wulilannan sɛbɛn bi.
     👉 Rawatib kɛ ka Faradhi tɔnɔ ɲinɛ.
onboarding.sadaqah_ok: • ✅ Sadakat sɛbɛn bi. I ka ɲinɛni ka ɲɛnabɔ.
onboarding.sadaqah_ko:
• 🔴 SADAKAT ƝƐNAMINƐNAN: Sadakat tɛ sɛbɛn bi.
     👉 'Sadakat bɛ zunubi faga ni ji ka wula faga'. Kɛ kɔrɔ.
onboarding.hadj_ok: 🕋 HADI SANNIN: I ɲinɛni ɲinɛ. I ka ɲinɛ i ka ɲinɛko wala teriw ka hadi sannin kɛ.
onboarding.hadj_ko: 🕋 HADI SIRA BƆ: I ka kɔlɔsi ({:.0f} {}) bɛ ɲɛnabɔ hadi sira la (Al-Istita'ah).
onboarding.tabaski: 🐑 UDHIYAH: Tabaski saraka bɛ Sunnah ɲuman ye i ka so kɔnɔ, i ka kɔlɔsi kɔnɔ.
onboarding.anniversaire_alerte:
⚠️ ƝƐNAMINƐNAN BAARA: Bi bɛ i ka ɲinɛ ko waati ye.
   👉 Sharia ɲɛnabɔ: I ka ɲinɛ ko ɲinɛ bɛ bid'a haram ye 4 skuli ma. I ka ɲinɛ waati ɲɛnabɔ kɔrɔ.
onboarding.age_islamique: 🎂 WAATI & UHAI: Hijria kalenda la, i ka ɲinɛ ko ɲinɛ bɛ san {:.1f}.
onboarding.fin_muharram:
📌 WAATI: An bɛ MOUHARRAM kalo la.
👉 Lamɛn: Ka du'a ni sadaka ɲinɛ.
onboarding.general_devotion:
📖 BII KƆNƆ ƝƐNAMINƐNAN:
   • Kuran: Bi waati dɔ ɲinɛ kuran karamɔ la.
   • Adhkar: Suba ni wula ka ɲinɛni kɛ.
   • Tɔnɔ: I ka ɲinɛ i ka kɔnɔ ka ɲɛnabɔ.
onboarding.guide_visiteur_humain:
👤 Sira Ɲɛnaminɛnan: Sɛbɛnni tɛ kɛ sababu ye.
🔐 Don ka taabolo ɲɛnaminɛnan ni i ka taarih ɲɛnabɔ.

evenements.evt_ramadan: 🌙 RAMADAN KALO: Ɲinɛni ɲinɛ kalo. Tarawihi ɲinɛ.
evenements.evt_aid_fitr: ✨ EID AL-FITR: Ɲinɛni ɲinɛ ɲinɛ. Zakat Al-Fitr tɛ ɲinɛ.
evenements.evt_aid_adha: 🐑 EID AL-ADHA (TABASKI): Saraka ɲinɛ. Bɛn ni baarakɛyɔrɔ ɲinɛ.
evenements.evt_achoura: 📌 ACHOURA ƆNƆ (10 Muharram): Ɲinɛni ka ɲinɛ (zunubi tɔ faga).
evenements.evt_arafa: 🕋 ARAFA ƆNƆ (9 Dhu al-Hijjah): Hadi ɲinɛni ɲinɛ kɔnɔ. Ɲinɛni ka ɲinɛ.
evenements.evt_nuits_sacrees: ✨ WULA ƝUMAN: Ɲinɛni ni ɲinɛni sallu wula (Tahajjud).

testament.limite_legale: ⚠️ ƝƐNAMINƐNAN KAN: Wasiyat tɛ ɲinɛ mara hakɛ 1/3 ni ɲinɛni tɔgɔ ɲinɛni tɛ.

encyclopedie.consigne: Sugu ɲinɛni sugandi ka sira ɲinɛni 3 sannin:

categories.texte:
✨ A ƝƐNƐ: KURAN ƝƐNƐN
Surat At-Tawbah, aya 34: 'Aw bɛ wari ni wari ma bɔn bɛ ɲinɛ ka Ala sirada la ɲinɛ, aw bɛ ɲinɛni ɲinɛ ɲinɛni bangen.'

✨ B ƝƐNƐ: HADITH ƝƐNƐN
Amr ibn Shu'ayb (Abu Dawud n°1563, Ɲɛnabɔ) kɔnɔ, Anabi ﷺ ye muso dɔ ni den muso dɔ ye wari kɔnɔ kɛnɛ. O ye: 'I bɛ Zakat ci?' O ye: 'Ayi'. O ye: 'I bɛ Ala b'i la wari wula kɛnɛ?'.

✨ C ƝƐNƐ: FIQH 4 SKULI (SUNNI)
• Hanafi Skuli: 2,5% bɛ wari bɛɛ la, kɛnɛ ɲinɛni tɛ sannin ɲinɛ.
• Maliki, Shafi'i, Hanbali Skuli: Muso kɛnɛ ɲinɛni wari tɛ Zakat la. Sindaw wala kɔlɔsi wari n'o kɛnɛ ni Zakat sannin.

✨ A ƝƐNƐ: KURAN ƝƐNƐN
Surat Al-An'am, aya 141: 'Aw bɛ ɲinɛni ɲinɛ sɛnɛ ɲinɛni ɲinɛ.'

✨ B ƝƐNƐ: HADITH ƝƐNƐN
Jabir (Muslim n°981) kɔnɔ, Anabi ﷺ ye: 'San wala ji ma ɲinɛni kɛ, ɲinɛni ɲinɛ 10% bɛ. San bɛnnen kɛ, ɲinɛni ɲinɛ 5% bɛ.' Nisab bɛ Wasaq 5 la (kg 653).

✨ C ƝƐNƐ: FIQH 4 SKULI (SUNNI)
San sannin ɲɛnabɔ. Baga kɔnɔ, Abu Bakr sira (Al-Bukhari n°1454) ye saga sannin labɛn: saga 40 ka se 120 = saga 1. Kun 40 kɔnɔ, Zakat tɛ bɛ.

✨ A ƝƐNƐ: KURAN ƝƐNƐN
Surat An-Nisa, aya 11: Sannin ɲinɛ bɛ wasiyat wala kɔrɔbɔ saraka kɔfɛ.

✨ B ƝƐNƐ: HADITH ƝƐNƐN
Salamah ibn al-Akwah (Al-Bukhari n°2289) kɔnɔ, maate dɔ tun bɛ Anabi ﷺ ɲinɛ kɛ. O ye: 'O bɛ kɔrɔbɔ dɔ ɲinɛ?' Aw ye: 'Ɛɛ, dinari saba'. O ye: 'Aw bɛ i ɲɛmɛso sallu kɛ (n'ni o sallu kɛ)'. Halin ɲɛmɛso dɔ ye kɔrɔbɔ ɲinɛ sara.

✨ C ƝƐNƐ: FIQH 4 SKULI (SUNNI)
• Kɔrɔbɔ Tɔgɔ: Mirath ni Wasiyat kɔnɔ ɲinɛni kɛnɛ. Maliki ni Hanbali kɔnɔ, Zakat wari sannin ɲinɛni ɲinɛ.
• Nɔɔni Ɲinɛni: Ɲinɛni ɲinɛni (tigi ɲinɛni), Hanafi skuli bɛ Zakat sara san o san, Maliki skuli bɛ ɲinɛ ɲinɛ kɛ.

✨ A ƝƐNƐ: KURAN ƝƐNƐN
Surat An-Nisa, aya 11: 'Nin bɛ Ala aw la ɲɛnabɔ i denw kɔnɔ: cɛ dɔ la, muso fila hakɛ bɛ.'

✨ B ƝƐNƐ: HADITH ƝƐNƐN
Ibn Abbas (Al-Bukhari n°6732, Muslim n°1615) kɔnɔ, Anabi ﷺ ye: 'Aw bɛ Fara'idh ɲinɛni tɔgɔ la ci. A ɲinɛni kɔfɛ, maate ɲɛnɛ ni ɲinɛni cɛ kɔnɔ.'

✨ C ƝƐNƐ: FIQH 4 SKULI (SUNNI)
Sannin hakɛ fila ɲɛnabɔ. A ɲinɛni bɛ cɛ tigi ɲinɛni kɛ (Nafaqah). Muso bɛ i ka ɲinɛni sannin ɲinɛ so kɔnɔ saraka tɛ. Ɲinɛni tɔgɔ bɛ: denw, fa ni na, balimaw, fa balimaw, den denw, denbaw, ni ɲinɛni cɛ wala muso.

✨ A ƝƐNƐ: KURAN ƝƐNƐN
Surat An-Nisa, aya 12: 'Cɛ wala muso maate ni ɲinɛni tɔgɔ (Kalâlah) dɔ tɛ, ni balima cɛ wala muso (na ɲinɛni) dɔ ɲinɛni, o fila bɛɛ bɛ ɲinɛ kelen. Aw ka u ɲinɛ sanu, u bɛ saba kelen.'

✨ B ƝƐNƐ: HADITH ƝƐNƐN
Abu Bakr As-Siddiq (ɲɛmɛso ɲɛnabɔ) ye: 'Kalâlah bɛ o ɲinɛni tigi dɔ tɛ den, wala fa cɛ wala wulu fa.'

✨ C ƝƐNƐ: FIQH 4 SKULI (SUNNI)
Kalâlah kɔnɔ, na balimaw (na fɛ) bɛ sannin kelen na sara cɛ ni muso fila (hakɛ fila tɛ). Fa ni na kelen balimaw bɛ a ɲinɛni ɲinɛ Asabah ye.

✨ A ƝƐNƐ: KURAN ƝƐNƐN
Surat Al-Baqarah, aya 180: 'Aw bɛ ɲɛnabɔ, maate n'i ɲinɛni bɔ, aw bɛ wasiyat kɛ i ka fa ni na ni i ɲɛmɛso ɲɛnɛ kɔnɔ...'

✨ B ƝƐNƐ: HADITH ƝƐNƐN
Sa'd ibn Abi Waqqas (Al-Bukhari n°2744, Muslim n°1628) kɔnɔ, Anabi ﷺ ye o ka banabagat waati ni o tun bɛ i ka mara bɛɛ sadaka kɛ: 'Saba ci. Saba bɛ ɲinɛ. I ɲinɛ i ka warimaw ɲinɛni ni o ɲinɛni n'u bɛ adamaw bolo.'

✨ C ƝƐNƐ: FIQH 4 SKULI (SUNNI)
Ɲɛnabɔ: Wasiyat tɛ ɲinɛni tɔgɔ dɔ la (maate kɔfɛ ɲɛmɛso bɛɛ ɲɛnabɔ n'o bɛ), ni saba 1/3 ni ɲinɛni ɲɛnabɔ kɔrɔbɔ saraka kɔfɛ. App bɛ a wulilan kɛ.

✨ A ƝƐNƐ: KURAN ƝƐNƐN
Surat Al-Hashr, aya 18: 'Aw y'i ɲɛnabɔ! Aw bɛ Ala ɲinɛ. Niyɛ kelen ye ka ɲinɛni kɛ ni o ɲinɛni labɛn ye.'

✨ B ƝƐNƐ: HADITH ƝƐNƐN
• Waati Npɛn (Al-Tirmidhi n°761, Ɲɛnabɔ): Anabi ﷺ ye: 'N'i bɛ kalo ɲinɛ kalo, n'i bɛ 13, 14 ni 15 kɛ.' A kɛ bɛ ɲinɛni bɛɛ kɛ ka ɲinɛ.
• Sallu ɲinɛni (Muslim n°728): Anabi ﷺ ye: 'O ɲinɛni bɛ Raka'a 12 sallu ɲinɛni kɛ ɲinɛni kɔnɔ, Ala bɛ o la so ɲinɛ Alanna.'

✨ C ƝƐNƐ: FIQH 4 SKULI (SUNNI)
Sallu ɲinɛni (Rawatib) ni waati npɛn kɛ, ɲinɛni ɲinɛni ɲɛnabɔ.
